subcodes.first_line: Many Tablets have been revealed in Arabic, and now, in the Persian tongue, I will impart the wondrous and holy Words of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الواح عربی منیع بسیار مشاهده شد حال بلسان پارسی بدایع کلمات قدس الهی القا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
